$uid..validate: newData.val() == null || (newData.hasChildren(['email','name','role','active']) && newData.child('email').isString() && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('role').isString() && newData.child('role').val().matches(/^(admin|manager|responsible|waiter)$/) && newData.child('active').isBoolean())

newData.val() == null || (newData.hasChildren(['uid','employeeName','date','entryTime','exitTime','pauseMinutes','notes','workedMinutes','scheduledShiftText','delayMinutes','earlyLeaveMinutes','updatedAt','updatedBy']) && newData.child('uid').isString() && newData.child('uid').val() === $uid && newData.child('employeeName').isString() && newData.child('date').isString() && newData.child('date').val() === $date && newData.child('entryTime').isString() && newData.child('exitTime').isString() && newData.child('pauseMinutes').isNumber() && newData.child('notes').isString() && (newData.child('workedMinutes').isNumber() || newData.child('workedMinutes').val() == null) && newData.child('scheduledShiftText').isString() && newData.child('delayMinutes').isNumber() && newData.child('earlyLeaveMinutes').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').isString() && newData.child('updatedBy').isString())
